creator: chris@cretaforce.gr
text:
In FreeBSD:

1) If I compile OpenSSL 1.1.1o and FreeTDS 1.3.11 on my home dir and tsql connection works fine.

2) If I compile FreeTDS 1.3.11 and use openssl-base then doesn't work.

Is it strange that in both cases 1.1.1o is used and with openssl-base doesn't work?
